articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Workers around the world demonstrate on May Day, in photos - AP News
articles.description: People across Asia kicked off May Day with large marches and protests as many workers grapple with rising energy costs and shrinking purchasing power tied to the Iran war.
articles.content: A man holds a poster with an image of former Soviet leader Josef Stalin as he and other Russian Communist Party supporters gather to mark Labor Day, also known as May Day, at the monument to 19th cen… [+121 chars]
